Bash(python -c "import subprocess; r = subprocess.run\(['powershell', '-Command', 'Get-Command soffice -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source'], capture_output=True, text=True\); print\(r.stdout, r.stderr\)")

Bash(python -c "import pptx; from pptx import Presentation; prs = Presentation\('SmartCare_AI_Logistics_Pitch.pptx'\); [print\(f'Slide {i+1}:', [shape.text_frame.text[:200] if shape.has_text_frame else '' for shape in slide.shapes]\) for i, slide in enumerate\(prs.slides\)]")
